scripts.dev:full: cd ../example && OPENCR_PORT=${OPENCR_PORT:-3002} docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d && echo 'Waiting for backend...' && until curl -sf -k https://localhost:${OPENCR_PORT:-3002}/fhir/metadata > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 15; echo 'Still waiting...'; done && echo 'Backend ready!' && cd ../ui && OPENCR_BACKEND=https://localhost:${OPENCR_PORT:-3002} vite
